name: com.pieeg.unity
description: Stream live EEG from a PiEEG-server into Unity and build no-code neuro-reactive avatars. Includes the Neuro Binder (a UI Toolkit routing table that maps EEG bands to blendshapes & materials), a live in-editor preview driven by the real signal, a general-purpose runtime reactor, and a VRChat SDK Automator that bakes mappings into clips + a 1D blend tree and merges them non-destructively via Modular Avatar.
